MINI MINUTES:

Francesca M. Lanpher, of Law Offices of Keesal, Young & Logan APC, Tel. 415.398.6000, for petitioners;

Ruling: The matter was not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER CHARLES SCHWAB & CO., INC.'S Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted, no opposition filed.
